chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Blood Money for Wounds and Head Injuries

text: رِوَايَةِ اِبْنِ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "فِي اَلْبَاضِعَةِ ثَلاَثَةٌ مِنَ اَلْإِبِلِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5382 - In the narration of Ibn Al-Mughirah from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), that he said:
"For the baḍiah (a wound that cuts through the flesh after the skin), the compensation is three camels."
